templates.text: {echoText}. That year is inscribed somewhere in the lower levels. The dungeon keeps a calendar none of its visitors were invited to read.
The dungeon was here in {echoText}. It does not discuss what it witnessed.
{echoText}. Something happened in that year that made the stone change temperature. You can feel it if you press your hand to the wall.
{echoText}. The dungeon divides its history into before and after that year. It does not explain which category you belong to.
In the sediment of this dungeon, {echoText} has its own layer — a thin seam of events compressed into stone. You just passed through it.
{echoText}. Whatever happened that year, it endured. The dungeon absorbed it and kept descending, as it always does.
Some of this dust is from {echoText}. You are breathing history that has no other form left.
{echoText}. A fixed point. The dungeon has been falling away from it ever since.
